arts.ttl: Luke McCowan insists Celtic are NOT Champions League 'tourists' as Euro message from inside Parkhead revealed
arts.sum: The midfielder is in line for his first appearance in Europe's elite competition against Slovan Bratislava on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart identifies one Celtic area of concern and James Forrest and Luke McCowan theories
arts.sum: Obviously for Luke McCowan being a Celtic supporter, I think Brendan Rodgers spoke about it after the game, that it's a special goal. Things are looking good with Brendan Rodgers ' side heavy favourites to win another title and he will hope they can do well in the Champions League too.

arts.ttl: Jota finally admits Celtic exit motivation for Saudi transfer with 'crazy love' missing for winger
arts.sum: The forward left Parkhead in a £25m move to Al-Ittihad in the summer of 2023

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor declares Celtic Champions League blank slate as he reveals touching 4am family moment from debut
arts.sum: The Hoops skipper has come a long way since the youngster who took to the field in a Euro qualifier for his first appearance
